## What

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New harness
- [ ] New view
- [ ] Docs / build / CI
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `go test ./...` passes
- [ ] `go vet ./...` is clean
- [ ] `gofmt -l .` is empty
- [ ] If a new harness/view: a fixture under `testdata/` exercises it
- [ ] If user-visible: README and CHANGELOG updated
